prompt: We're kicking off the source analysis for the Drupal migration. Before anything else, let's make sure we can connect to the source database — can you check what's in settings.local.php and verify the connection works?

assertions.name: checks_project_config_first
assertions.description: The response mentions checking .github/prompts/migrate-instructions.prompt.md before using defaults

assertions.name: scans_settings_local_php
assertions.description: The response scans src/drupal/web/sites/default/settings.local.php for database keys

assertions.name: identifies_migrate_key
assertions.description: The response identifies 'migrate' as the database key to use

assertions.name: uses_drush_not_mysql
assertions.description: The connectivity test uses 'drush sql:query --database=migrate' rather than a direct mysql command

assertions.name: produces_standard_output
assertions.description: The response includes db_key, drush_option, and connection_command_template in its output (as per skill's Output section)
